mechanism: Budget alerts use forecasted threshold type instead of hardcoded actual-spend thresholds.
why: Actual-spend thresholds (50%, 80%) fire on normal consumption variability — noise without decision value. A single forecast threshold detects trend deviations regardless of spend pattern.

related.note: Forecast alerts reach the team that owns the spend.
Forecast alert wired to the landing zone action group.
Variable spend from consumption services makes forecast the only useful signal.

violations: Budget with actual-spend thresholds alongside forecast — noise from normal variability.
Budget with only actual-spend thresholds — alerts fire after spend, not before deviation.
Multiple forecast thresholds at different percentages — lower thresholds fire on normal trajectories.
